title: Schimb valutar
overview: How far can one person go to try and reclaim what they have lost? In a country town, Emil (Cosmin Selesi) becomes unemployed when the factory where he worked closes. After his wife loses her job as well, the two decide to travel to Australia; drawbacks, however, start even before they board a plane.

trailers.title: Schimb Valutar, film romanesc cu Aliona Munteanu
